General.Name: SEEC Media Group Ltd
General.Description: BFB Health Limited, an investment holding company, provides advertising agency services in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. It offers e-commerce platform services, as well as sells related goods; sells high-tech products; distributes books and magazines; and engages in the money lending business. The company was formerly known as SEEC Media Group Limited and changed its name to BFB Health Limited in December 2025. BFB Health Limited was incorporated in 1989 and is based in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong.
General.Address: The Center, Sheung Wan, Hong Kong
